query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN quotationNumber LIKE '%-v%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_version,
       SUM(CASE WHEN quotationNumber NOT LIKE '%-v%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sin_version
FROM quotations 
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL AND dataOrigin = 'manual'
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN quotationNumber LIKE '%-v%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_version,
       SUM(CASE WHEN quotationNumber NOT LIKE '%-v%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sin_version
FROM quotations 
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL AND dataOrigin = 'manual'
